---
title: Proteomic Data Overview
subtitle: SpringBloom2021 - Genome-resolved Metaproteomic Dataset
date: 09.04.2025
author: Cyrill Hofer
output:
  rmdformats::readthedown:
    highlight: tango
    self_contained: true
    code_folding: hide
    thumbnails: true
    gallery: false
    fig_width: 15
    df_print: kable
    fig_caption: yes
    use_bookdown: true
    css: custom.css
---

# Data Preparation
- Note: This data does not contain and protein identifications from contaminants
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, paged.print=FALSE}
# Clear R's Brain
rm(list = ls())

# Set the working directory
setwd("/SynologyDrive/PhD/Projects/SpringBloom2021/DataAnalysis_SpringBloom2021/Figure_02/ProteomeSpecificity/")

# Load the libraries
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(DT)
library(plotly)
library(tidyr)
library(scales)
library(forcats)

# Load the color palette
source("ColorPalette.R")

# Load the data
dat <- read_csv(file = "ProteinGroupResolution.csv")
```

# publication
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(patchwork)

# -----------------------------
# Settings
# -----------------------------
desired_order <- c(
  "Species_Resolution", 
  "Genus_Resolution", 
  "Family_Resolution", 
  "Order_Resolution", 
  "Class_Resolution", 
  "Phylum_Resolution"
)

fill_cols_3 <- c(
  Species = ColorPalette[1],
  Genus   = ColorPalette[3],
  Rest    = "grey80"
)

collapse_resolution <- function(x) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    x == "Species_Resolution" ~ "Species",
    x == "Genus_Resolution"   ~ "Genus",
    TRUE                      ~ "Rest"
  )
}

# -----------------------------
# 1) PIE 1: Unique proteins (counts)
# -----------------------------
plot_dat_counts <- dat %>%
  mutate(
    ProteinGroup_Resolution = factor(ProteinGroup_Resolution, levels = desired_order),
    Category = collapse_resolution(ProteinGroup_Resolution)
  ) %>%
  count(Category, name = "Value") %>%
  mutate(Percent = Value / sum(Value) * 100)

legend_counts <- setNames(
  paste0(plot_dat_counts$Category, " (",
         plot_dat_counts$Value, ", ",
         sprintf("%.1f%%", plot_dat_counts$Percent), ")"),
  plot_dat_counts$Category
)

p_counts <- ggplot(plot_dat_counts, aes(x = "", y = Value, fill = Category)) +
  geom_col(width = 1, color = "black") +
  coord_polar(theta = "y", start = 0) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols_3, labels = legend_counts) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.text       = element_blank(),
    axis.title      = element_blank(),
    panel.grid      = element_blank(),
    legend.text     = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16)
  ) +
  ggtitle("A) Protein groups (counts)")

# -----------------------------
# 2) PIE 2: Normalized abundance (sum)
#    Uses the normalized total abundance column:
#    Total_Abundance_Per_Protein = sum(Protein_Abundance_IBAQ_Norm) per protein
# -----------------------------
stopifnot("Total_Abundance_Per_Protein" %in% colnames(dat))

plot_dat_abund_norm <- dat %>%
  mutate(
    ProteinGroup_Resolution = factor(ProteinGroup_Resolution, levels = desired_order),
    Category = collapse_resolution(ProteinGroup_Resolution)
  ) %>%
  group_by(Category) %>%
  summarise(Value = sum(Total_Abundance_Per_Protein, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(Percent = Value / sum(Value) * 100)

legend_abund_norm <- setNames(
  paste0(plot_dat_abund_norm$Category, " (",
         format(plot_dat_abund_norm$Value, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3), ", ",
         sprintf("%.1f%%", plot_dat_abund_norm$Percent), ")"),
  plot_dat_abund_norm$Category
)

p_abund_norm <- ggplot(plot_dat_abund_norm, aes(x = "", y = Value, fill = Category)) +
  geom_col(width = 1, color = "black") +
  coord_polar(theta = "y", start = 0) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols_3, labels = legend_abund_norm) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.text       = element_blank(),
    axis.title      = element_blank(),
    panel.grid      = element_blank(),
    legend.text     = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16)
  ) +
  ggtitle("B) Protein abundance (summed normalized IBAQ)")

# -----------------------------
# 3) Combine (stacked) + export
# -----------------------------
combined_pies <- p_counts / p_abund_norm + plot_layout(guides = "collect")

print(combined_pies)

ggsave(
  filename = "ProteinGroupResolution_Pies_Counts_and_NormIBAQ.pdf",
  plot     = combined_pies,
  width    = 8.27,
  height   = 11.69,
  units    = "in",
  device   = "pdf"
)

```
